Class GarbageManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.GarbageManager
public class GarbageManager extends Object
Manages garbage block sending and processing in multiplayer mode. Handles sending garbage to opponents when lines are cleared and processing garbage queues for each player.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Callback interface for triggering game over.

  • Method Details

    • setAudioManager

      public void setAudioManager(AudioManager audioManager)
      Sets the audio manager for playing sounds.
      Parameters:
      audioManager - The audio manager to use

    • setGameControllers

      public void setGameControllers(GameController gameController1, GameController gameController2)
      Sets the game controllers for both players.

    • setMultiplayerScreen

      public void setMultiplayerScreen(MultiplayerScreen multiplayerScreen)
      Sets the multiplayer screen reference.

    • setSinglePlayerScreen

      public void setSinglePlayerScreen(SinglePlayerScreen singlePlayerScreen)
      Sets the single player screen reference.

    • setSinglePlayerViewManager

      public void setSinglePlayerViewManager(SinglePlayerViewManager singlePlayerViewManager)
      Sets the single player view manager reference.

    • setGameOverCallback

      public void setGameOverCallback(GarbageManager.GameOverCallback gameOverCallback)
      Sets the game over callback.

    • sendGarbageToOpponent

      public void sendGarbageToOpponent(int fromPlayerNumber, int numGarbageLines)
      Sends garbage to the opponent's queue when lines are cleared in multiplayer mode.
      Parameters:
      fromPlayerNumber - The player number who cleared lines (1 or 2)
      numGarbageLines - Number of garbage lines to send

    • processGarbageQueue

      public void processGarbageQueue(int playerNumber)
      Processes garbage queue for a player, adding pending garbage lines to the board. Processes all pending garbage lines at once to avoid delays when multiple lines are sent together.
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2)
